success.title: Message Sent!
success.description: Thank you for contacting us. We'll get back to you as soon as possible.

hero.title: Get in Touch
hero.subtitle: Have questions or need assistance? Our team is here to help. Reach out and we'll respond within 24-48 hours.

form.title: Send us a Message
form.subject: Subject *
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us how we can help...

manageOnline.question: Can I manage my appointments online?
manageOnline.answer: Yes. You can schedule, view, and manage your appointments directly through the MedWasla platform.

insurance.question: Do you accept insurance?
insurance.answer: Yes, we accept most major insurance plans. Please contact our billing department or check with your insurance provider.

scheduleAppointment.question: How do I schedule an appointment?
scheduleAppointment.answer: You can schedule an appointment through our online booking system, by phone, or by visiting our facility.

telemedicine.question: Do you offer telemedicine services?
telemedicine.answer: Yes, we offer telemedicine consultations for certain medical conditions.
